projectSlug.title: Project Slug
projectSlug.description: The project identifier in the URL (e.g. 'temp2' from demoapp.bloomreach.com/p/temp2)

cookies.title: Session Cookies
cookies.description: ALL cookies from a logged-in Bloomreach session INCLUDING httpOnly ones. Use the 'Cookie-Editor' browser extension to export. cookieStore.getAll() does NOT work (misses httpOnly session cookies).

keyName.title: API Key Name
keyName.description: Name for the new API key (default: forge_run)

email.title: Email (fallback, blocked by CAPTCHA)
email.description: Bloomreach login email. Only needed if NOT using cookies. Currently blocked by reCAPTCHA.

password.title: Password (fallback, blocked by CAPTCHA)
password.description: Bloomreach login password. Only needed if NOT using cookies. Currently blocked by reCAPTCHA.
